{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Helgard uniform
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard uniform]] is a blue cloak lined with white fur.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
